subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-05 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The air in this place is most excellent. The purity herein is surpassing fair. In the vicinity of the Most Exalted Shrine lieth a place of repose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هوای اینجا بسیار خوب است.  صفای اینجا بسیار خوب است.  در جوار مقام اعلی محل راحتی است
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual transformation
